mainEntity.name: Can family members claim death benefits for fatal workplace injury in Riverton?
mainEntity.text: Can family members claim death benefits for fatal workplace injury in Riverton?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah death benefits to spouse (2/3 wages 8 years), dependents.

suggestedAnswer.text: §34A-2-419: burial $10K, dependency payments. File promptly. Wrongful death suits if third-party fault. Emotional claims complex.

name: Family Death Benefits in Utah Work Fatalities
description: Yes, Utah death benefits to spouse (2/3 wages 8 years), dependents.
